pluginDescription: Synchronize TX-5DR radio frequency and operating mode to WaveLog in real time.
apiUrlDescription: WaveLog radio API endpoint. If the path is omitted, /index.php/api/radio is appended automatically.
apiKeyDescription: WaveLog API key used to authorize radio status updates.
radioNameDescription: Radio identifier sent to WaveLog with each frequency and mode update.
pollIntervalDescription: How often TX-5DR checks the current radio state and sends changed values to WaveLog.
